user.title: Set up Water Meter
user.description: Enter the details of your water meter device.

data_description.host: The IP address or hostname of your water meter (e.g. 10.27.3.86)
data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the device for new readings (minimum 1 second)

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Water Meter
reconfigure.description: Update the connection details for your water meter.

data_description.host: The IP address or hostname of your water meter (e.g. 10.27.3.86)
data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the device for new readings (minimum 1 second)

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the water meter. Check the IP address and that the device is reachable.
error.invalid_response: Connected but the response doesn't look like water meter metrics. Check the endpoint path.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This water meter is already configured.

data_description.host: The IP address or hostname of your water meter (e.g. 10.27.3.86)
data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the device for new readings (minimum 1 second)
